steps.title: Identify what the blank must signal
steps.content: The passage describes a chronological process: soak, then simmer for hours or days, then — blank — remove the cloth. The blank must signal forward progression in time, indicating that the removal comes after the extended simmering wait.

steps.title: Eliminate each wrong choice
steps.content:
• Choice A — Nevertheless,: Signals contrast or concession — implies the removal happens despite the simmering, which is illogical for a sequential process. ✗
  • Choice B — Likewise,: Signals similarity — implies the removal is similar to the simmering rather than the next step after it. ✗
  • Choice C — Eventually,: Signals that something happens after a period of time — exactly right for the final step following hours or days of simmering. ✓
  • Choice D — In other words,: Signals restatement or paraphrase — implies the removal is just another way of saying what the simmering sentence said, which makes no sense. ✗
C is correct.
